title: Effect items
description: mod that adds things - potion effect icons and more!
body:
# Disclaimer
1. **This mod may have "major" bugs that may hinder your process or annoy you in the game. You can either tolerate these bugs and wait for a version with bug fixes, or wait for version 1.0.0**
2. **Since this mod is a beta, some things are just not finished. Again, you can either be patient or wait for version 1.0.0**
# mods that are required or recommended
OptiFine --> for best look for structures

# First past fashion
_A long time ago (2019) I dreamed of making a mod that adds potion effect icons as items. Now I have the opportunity._
# About mod
This mod adds:
1. Unbalanced things that will make your playthrough interesting
2. Various structures
3. Remastered version of "Villager translator"
4. New ores
And much more!
# Was inspired by:
1. Google translate
2. Gragphity falls cartoon
# Have a nice game!!! UwU
# [RU] Join our telegram channel
## [Click!](https://t.me/fandompoppyplaytime)
